question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child BC potential segment and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 s
    WHERE s.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) d
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks_ranked_cte
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks_ranked_cte
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8
),
segment_period_sums_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.campus_tier,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte) THEN s.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_4w_mg,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte) THEN s.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_p4w_mg
  FROM data_867 s
  WHERE s.week_end_date >= (
    SELECT MIN(week_end_date)
    FROM p4w_weeks_cte
  )
  GROUP BY
    s.campus_tier
),
national_period_sums_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte) THEN s.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_4w_mg_nation,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte) THEN s.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_p4w_mg_nation
  FROM data_867 s
  WHERE s.week_end_date >= (
    SELECT MIN(week_end_date)
    FROM p4w_weeks_cte
  )
),
weeks_included_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'R4W' AS window_label,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(r.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.week_end_date ASC) AS weeks_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.week_end_date) AS weeks_count
  FROM r4w_weeks_cte r
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'P4W' AS window_label,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(p.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.week_end_date ASC) AS weeks_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.week_end_date) AS weeks_count
  FROM p4w_weeks_cte p
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    seg.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(seg.sales_4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(seg.sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(nat.sales_4w_mg_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_mg_nation,
    CAST(ROUND(nat.sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_mg_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN seg.sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND seg.sales_4w_mg > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN seg.sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND seg.sales_4w_mg = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((seg.sales_4w_mg - seg.sales_p4w_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(seg.sales_p4w_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_segment_int,
    CASE
      WHEN nat.sales_p4w_mg_nation = 0 AND nat.sales_4w_mg_nation > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN nat.sales_p4w_mg_nation = 0 AND nat.sales_4w_mg_nation = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((nat.sales_4w_mg_nation - nat.sales_p4w_mg_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nat.sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_nation_int
  FROM segment_period_sums_cte seg
  CROSS JOIN national_period_sums_cte nat
)
SELECT
  f.campus_tier,
  f.sales_4w_mg,
  f.sales_p4w_mg,
  CONCAT(ROUND(f.growth_4w_pct_segment_int, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct_segment,
  f.sales_4w_mg_nation,
  f.sales_p4w_mg_nation,
  CONCAT(ROUND(f.growth_4w_pct_nation_int, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct_nation,
  CONCAT(ROUND((f.growth_4w_pct_segment_int - f.growth_4w_pct_nation_int), 0), '%') AS growth_vs_nation_delta_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN f.growth_4w_pct_segment_int > f.growth_4w_pct_nation_int THEN 'Higher'
    WHEN f.growth_4w_pct_segment_int < f.growth_4w_pct_nation_int THEN 'Lower'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS vs_nation_flag,
  (SELECT weeks_included FROM weeks_included_cte WHERE window_label = 'R4W') AS weeks_included_r4w,
  (SELECT weeks_included FROM weeks_included_cte WHERE window_label = 'P4W') AS weeks_included_p4w
FROM final_metrics_cte f
ORDER BY
  f.campus_tier ASC;

WITH
max_week_in_data AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_valid_sales AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
first_ship_week_by_campus AS (
  SELECT
    campus_id,
    MIN(week_end_date) AS first_week_end_date
  FROM base_valid_sales
  GROUP BY campus_id
),
new_accounts_in_last_52_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    f.campus_id,
    b.campus_tier
  FROM first_ship_week_by_campus f
  INNER JOIN base_valid_sales b
    ON b.campus_id = f.campus_id
   AND b.week_end_date = f.first_week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN max_week_in_data m
  WHERE f.first_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -364, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    f.campus_id,
    b.campus_tier
),
counts_by_tier AS (
  SELECT
    campus_tier,
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_accounts_in_last_52_weeks
  GROUP BY campus_tier
),
total_new AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS total_new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_accounts_in_last_52_weeks
)
SELECT
  c.campus_tier,
  c.new_accounts_52w,
  CASE
    WHEN t.total_new_accounts_52w = 0 THEN '0%'
    ELSE CONCAT(
      CAST(ROUND(100.0 * c.new_accounts_52w / NULLIF(t.total_new_accounts_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
      '%'
    )
  END AS contribution_to_total_52w
FROM counts_by_tier c
CROSS JOIN total_new t
ORDER BY c.new_accounts_52w DESC;

period_flags_cte AS (
  SELECT
    f.campus_id,
    f.first_active_week_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS current_52w_start,
    m.max_week_end_date AS current_52w_end,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -103, m.max_week_end_date) AS prior_52w_start,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -52, m.max_week_end_date) AS prior_52w_end,
    CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS new_business_current_52w_flag,
    CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -103, m.max_week_end_date) AND DATEADD(WEEK, -52, m.max_week_end_date) THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS new_business_prior_52w_flag
  FROM first_active_week_by_campus_cte f
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
new_business_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.new_business_current_52w_flag = 1 THEN p.campus_id END) AS new_business_accounts_52w,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.new_business_prior_52w_flag = 1 THEN p.campus_id END) AS new_business_accounts_prev_52w
  FROM period_flags_cte p
),
new_business_sales_by_period_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN p.new_business_current_52w_flag = 1
         AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
         AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN p.current_52w_start AND p.current_52w_end
        THEN d.relmora_total_mg
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS new_business_sales_mg_52w,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN p.new_business_prior_52w_flag = 1
         AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
         AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN p.prior_52w_start AND p.prior_52w_end
        THEN d.relmora_total_mg
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w
  FROM period_flags_cte p
  JOIN data_867 d
    ON d.campus_id = p.campus_id
  WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
growth_calcs_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.new_business_accounts_52w,
    s.new_business_sales_mg_52w,
    c.new_business_accounts_prev_52w,
    s.new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN c.new_business_accounts_prev_52w = 0 AND c.new_business_accounts_52w > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN c.new_business_accounts_prev_52w = 0 AND c.new_business_accounts_52w = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((c.new_business_accounts_52w - c.new_business_accounts_prev_52w) / NULLIF(c.new_business_accounts_prev_52w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS new_business_accounts_growth_52w_pct_int,
    CASE
      WHEN s.new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w = 0 AND s.new_business_sales_mg_52w > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN s.new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w = 0 AND s.new_business_sales_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((s.new_business_sales_mg_52w - s.new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w) / NULLIF(s.new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS new_business_sales_mg_growth_52w_pct_int
  FROM new_business_counts_cte c
  CROSS JOIN new_business_sales_by_period_cte s
)
SELECT
  new_business_accounts_52w,
  new_business_sales_mg_52w,
  new_business_accounts_prev_52w,
  new_business_sales_mg_prev_52w,
  CONCAT(ROUND(new_business_accounts_growth_52w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS new_business_accounts_growth_52w_pct,
  CONCAT(ROUND(new_business_sales_mg_growth_52w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS new_business_sales_mg_growth_52w_pct
FROM growth_calcs_cte;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date AS window_end,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region AS campus_region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start AND w.window_end
    AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start AND w.window_end
    AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region AS campus_region,
    r.active_accounts_52w AS active_accounts_52w,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        (r.active_accounts_52w::FLOAT / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_52w, 0)) * 100,
        0
      )::INTEGER,
      '%'
    ) AS "active_accounts_contribution_52w%"
  FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
  CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    n.national_active_accounts_52w AS active_accounts_52w,
    '100%' AS "active_accounts_contribution_52w%"
  FROM national_active_accounts_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  active_accounts_52w,
  "active_accounts_contribution_52w%"
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY active_accounts_52w DESC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY parent_id
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ss.parent_id,
    ss.segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(100 * ss.segment_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(100 * ss.segment_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0)
    END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value DESC, segment_sales_52w DESC;

  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_week_end_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= w.max_week_end_date
),
parent_segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier
),
national_total_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
segment_contribution_rollup_cte AS (
  SELECT
    pss.campus_tier,
    SUM(pss.segment_sales_52w) AS segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(100 * SUM(pss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(pss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0)
    END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM parent_segment_sales_cte pss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_sales_cte nt
  GROUP BY
    pss.campus_tier,
    nt.national_total_sales_52w
)
SELECT
  campus_tier,
  CAST(segment_sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w
FROM segment_contribution_rollup_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_pct_52w_value DESC,
  segment_sales_52w DESC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
r52w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 52
  ) d
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
r52w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
),
r4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
p4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
),
national_p4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM r52w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM r4w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM p4w_area_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    COALESCE(r52.sales_52w, 0) AS sales_52w,
    COALESCE(r4.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p4.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS sales_prev_4w,
    n52.national_sales_52w
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN r52w_area_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN r4w_area_sales_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN p4w_area_sales_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region AS "Area",
    CAST(ROUND(sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN national_sales_52w > 0 THEN (sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0)
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_52w > 0 THEN (sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0)
          ELSE 0
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'National' AS "Area",
    CAST(ROUND(n52.national_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(n4.national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(p4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    '100%' AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n4.national_sales_4w - p4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    100 AS contribution_pct_value
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte p4
),
final_with_nation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    "Area",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    contribution_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "Area",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    contribution_pct_value
  FROM national_metrics_cte
)
SELECT
  "Area",
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
  "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%"
FROM final_with_nation_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_value DESC;

  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
r52w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS r52w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_r52w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
),
r4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS r4w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
p4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS p4w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_r4w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
),
national_p4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_p4w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM r52w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM r4w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM p4w_area_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    COALESCE(r52.r52w_sales, 0) AS r52w_sales,
    COALESCE(r4.r4w_sales, 0) AS r4w_sales,
    COALESCE(p4.p4w_sales, 0) AS p4w_sales,
    n52.national_r52w_sales,
    n4.national_r4w_sales,
    np4.national_p4w_sales
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN r52w_area_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN r4w_area_sales_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN p4w_area_sales_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte np4
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region AS "Area",
    CAST(r52w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(r4w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(p4w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN national_r52w_sales > 0
              THEN (r52w_sales * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_r52w_sales, 0)
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((r4w_sales - p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4w_sales, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((national_r4w_sales - national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_p4w_sales, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((r4w_sales - p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4w_sales, 0)
            END,
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        )
        >
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((national_r4w_sales - national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_p4w_sales, 0)
            END,
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN national_r52w_sales > 0
            THEN (r52w_sales * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_r52w_sales, 0)
          ELSE 0
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w_value_for_sort
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
nation_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS "Area",
    CAST(n52.national_r52w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(n4.national_r4w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(p4.national_p4w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE WHEN n52.national_r52w_sales > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END
        AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n4.national_r4w_sales - p4.national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_p4w_sales, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n4.national_r4w_sales - p4.national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_p4w_sales, 0)
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((n4.national_r4w_sales - p4.national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_p4w_sales, 0)
            END,
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        )
        >
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN p4.national_p4w_sales = 0 AND n4.national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((n4.national_r4w_sales - p4.national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_p4w_sales, 0)
            END,
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    CAST(CASE WHEN n52.national_r52w_sales > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS INTEGER) AS contribution_pct_52w_value_for_sort
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte p4
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    "Area",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value_for_sort
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "Area",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value_for_sort
  FROM nation_row_cte
)
SELECT
  "Area",
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  contribution_pct_52w,
  growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  vs_nation
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value_for_sort DESC;

WITH max_dt AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_qtr AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    (
      SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year)
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    ) AS recent_quarter_year_label
  FROM max_dt m
),
prior_qtr AS (
  SELECT
    r.*,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM recent_qtr r
),
flags AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_complete,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_quarter_complete
  FROM prior_qtr p
),
distinct_weeks AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
included_weeks_recent AS (
  SELECT
    dw.week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks dw
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, dw.week_end_date), f.recent_quarter_start_date),
        LEAST(dw.week_end_date, f.recent_quarter_end_date)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
),
included_weeks_prior AS (
  SELECT
    dw.week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks dw
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, dw.week_end_date), f.prior_quarter_start_date),
        LEAST(dw.week_end_date, f.prior_quarter_end_date)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
),
week_counts AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM included_weeks_recent) AS count_weeks_recent,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM included_weeks_prior) AS count_weeks_prior,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) FROM included_weeks_recent) AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) FROM included_weeks_prior) AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
),
totals_complete AS (
  SELECT
    f.recent_quarter_year_label,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.recent_quarter_year_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN f.prior_quarter_start_date AND f.prior_quarter_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
  FROM flags f
  CROSS JOIN data_867 d
  GROUP BY f.recent_quarter_year_label
),
weekly_avgs_incomplete AS (
  SELECT
    f.recent_quarter_year_label,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM included_weeks_recent) THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(wc.count_weeks_recent, 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales_recent_quarter,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM included_weeks_prior) THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(wc.count_weeks_prior, 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales_prior_quarter
  FROM flags f
  CROSS JOIN week_counts wc
  CROSS JOIN data_867 d
  GROUP BY f.recent_quarter_year_label, wc.count_weeks_recent, wc.count_weeks_prior
)
SELECT
  f.recent_quarter_year_label,
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter
    ELSE NULL
  END AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
    ELSE NULL
  END AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1) THEN wa.weekly_sales_recent_quarter
    ELSE NULL
  END AS weekly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1) THEN wa.weekly_sales_prior_quarter
    ELSE NULL
  END AS weekly_sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
          CASE
            WHEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
            ELSE ((tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter - tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter) / NULLIF(tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter, 0)) * 100
          END
        ELSE
          CASE
            WHEN wa.weekly_sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND wa.weekly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
            ELSE ((wa.weekly_sales_recent_quarter - wa.weekly_sales_prior_quarter) / NULLIF(wa.weekly_sales_prior_quarter, 0)) * 100
          END
      END
    , 0),
  '%') AS growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1) THEN wc.recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates
    ELSE NULL
  END AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (f.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete = 1) THEN wc.prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
    ELSE NULL
  END AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
FROM flags f
CROSS JOIN week_counts wc
LEFT JOIN totals_complete tc
  ON tc.recent_quarter_year_label = f.recent_quarter_year_label
LEFT JOIN weekly_avgs_incomplete wa
  ON wa.recent_quarter_year_label = f.recent_quarter_year_label;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_label_cte AS (
  SELECT quarter_year AS recent_quarter_label
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date = (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY quarter_year) = 1
),
recent_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
prior_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM recent_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte r
),
prior_quarter_label_cte AS (
  SELECT quarter_year AS prior_quarter_label
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date = (
    SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -1, recent_quarter_start_date)
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte
  )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY quarter_year) = 1
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date,
    CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_complete,
    CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_quarter_complete,
    CASE
      WHEN (m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date)
        AND (m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date)
      THEN 0
      ELSE 1
    END AS normalization_required
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte r
  CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte p
),
weekly_inclusion_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
    pc.recent_quarter_start_date,
    pc.recent_quarter_end_date,
    pc.prior_quarter_start_date,
    pc.prior_quarter_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
        0,
        DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), pc.recent_quarter_start_date),
          LEAST(d.week_end_date, pc.recent_quarter_end_date)
        ) + 1
      ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_recent_quarter_week,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
        0,
        DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), pc.prior_quarter_start_date),
          LEAST(d.week_end_date, pc.prior_quarter_end_date)
        ) + 1
      ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_prior_quarter_week
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) d
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  WHERE d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
quarter_sales_basis_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rql.recent_quarter_label,
    pql.prior_quarter_label,
    pc.normalization_required,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = rql.recent_quarter_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(
        SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_recent_quarter_week = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_recent_quarter_week = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
        AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS sales_recent_quarter,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pql.prior_quarter_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(
        SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_quarter_week = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_quarter_week = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
        AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS sales_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label_cte rql
  CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_label_cte pql
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  LEFT JOIN weekly_inclusion_cte wi
    ON wi.week_end_date = d.week_end_date
  WHERE d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  GROUP BY
    rql.recent_quarter_label,
    pql.prior_quarter_label,
    pc.normalization_required
),
qoq_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    recent_quarter_label,
    prior_quarter_label,
    sales_recent_quarter,
    sales_prior_quarter,
    CASE
      WHEN sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND sales_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(
        ((sales_recent_quarter - sales_prior_quarter) * 100)
        / NULLIF(sales_prior_quarter, 0)
        AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS growth_qoq_pct_int,
    CASE
      WHEN normalization_required = 0 THEN 'TOTAL_SALES'
      ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVERAGE_SALES'
    END AS basis_used
  FROM quarter_sales_basis_cte
),
weeks_included_output_cte AS (
  SELECT
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN include_recent_quarter_week = 1 THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_weeks_included,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN include_prior_quarter_week = 1 THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_weeks_included
  FROM weekly_inclusion_cte
)
SELECT
  g.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
  g.sales_recent_quarter AS sales_recent_quarter,
  g.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
  g.sales_prior_quarter AS sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(ROUND(g.growth_qoq_pct_int, 0), '%') AS "growth_qoq_%",
  g.basis_used AS basis_used,
  CASE WHEN g.basis_used = 'WEEKLY_AVERAGE_SALES' THEN w.recent_quarter_weeks_included ELSE NULL END AS recent_quarter_weeks_included,
  CASE WHEN g.basis_used = 'WEEKLY_AVERAGE_SALES' THEN w.prior_quarter_weeks_included ELSE NULL END AS prior_quarter_weeks_included
FROM qoq_growth_cte g
CROSS JOIN weeks_included_output_cte w;
NO_VISUALIZATION

WITH max_week AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_q AS (
  SELECT
    mw.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', mw.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', mw.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end,
    (
      SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year)
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE d.week_end_date = mw.max_week_end_date
    ) AS recent_quarter_year_label
  FROM max_week mw
),
prior_q AS (
  SELECT
    rq.max_week_end_date,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, rq.recent_quarter_start) AS prior_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, rq.recent_quarter_start) AS prior_quarter_end,
    (
      SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year)
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, rq.recent_quarter_start) AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, rq.recent_quarter_start)
    ) AS prior_quarter_year_label
  FROM recent_q rq
),
flags AS (
  SELECT
    rq.recent_quarter_year_label,
    pq.prior_quarter_year_label,
    rq.recent_quarter_start,
    rq.recent_quarter_end,
    pq.prior_quarter_start,
    pq.prior_quarter_end,
    rq.max_week_end_date,
    IFF(rq.max_week_end_date >= rq.recent_quarter_end, TRUE, FALSE) AS recent_quarter_complete,
    IFF(rq.max_week_end_date >= pq.prior_quarter_end, TRUE, FALSE) AS prior_quarter_complete
  FROM recent_q rq
  JOIN prior_q pq
    ON 1 = 1
),
quarter_filter AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    IFF(f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete, 'TOTAL', 'WEEKLY_AVG') AS comparison_basis
  FROM flags f
),
weeks_recent AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_filter qf
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
    AND (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), qf.recent_quarter_start),
        LEAST(d.week_end_date, qf.recent_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weeks_prior AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_filter qf
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
    AND (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), qf.prior_quarter_start),
        LEAST(d.week_end_date, qf.prior_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weeks_agg AS (
  SELECT
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(wr.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wr.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(wp.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wp.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    COUNT(wr.week_end_date) AS included_week_count_recent,
    COUNT(wp.week_end_date) AS included_week_count_prior
  FROM quarter_filter qf
  LEFT JOIN weeks_recent wr
    ON qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
  LEFT JOIN weeks_prior wp
    ON qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
  GROUP BY
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis
),
totals_complete AS (
  SELECT
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = qf.recent_quarter_year_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS sales_recent_quarter,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = qf.prior_quarter_year_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_filter qf
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE qf.comparison_basis = 'TOTAL'
    AND d.quarter_year IN (qf.recent_quarter_year_label, qf.prior_quarter_year_label)
  GROUP BY
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis
),
totals_incomplete AS (
  SELECT
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN wr.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS sales_recent_quarter,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN wp.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_filter qf
    ON 1 = 1
  LEFT JOIN weeks_recent wr
    ON qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
   AND d.week_end_date = wr.week_end_date
  LEFT JOIN weeks_prior wp
    ON qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
   AND d.week_end_date = wp.week_end_date
  WHERE qf.comparison_basis = 'WEEKLY_AVG'
    AND (wr.week_end_date IS NOT NULL OR wp.week_end_date IS NOT NULL)
  GROUP BY
    qf.recent_quarter_year_label,
    qf.prior_quarter_year_label,
    qf.comparison_basis
),
final_calc AS (
  SELECT
    wa.recent_quarter_year_label,
    t.sales_recent_quarter,
    wa.prior_quarter_year_label,
    t.sales_prior_quarter,
    wa.comparison_basis,
    wa.included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    wa.included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    wa.included_week_count_recent,
    wa.included_week_count_prior,
    CAST(ROUND(t.sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(wa.included_week_count_recent, 0)) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_avg_sales_recent_quarter,
    CAST(ROUND(t.sales_prior_quarter / NULLIF(wa.included_week_count_prior, 0)) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_avg_sales_prior_quarter
  FROM weeks_agg wa
  JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM totals_complete
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM totals_incomplete
  ) t
    ON t.recent_quarter_year_label = wa.recent_quarter_year_label
   AND t.prior_quarter_year_label = wa.prior_quarter_year_label
   AND t.comparison_basis = wa.comparison_basis
)
SELECT
  recent_quarter_year_label,
  sales_recent_quarter,
  prior_quarter_year_label,
  sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN comparison_basis = 'TOTAL' THEN
            CASE
              WHEN sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND sales_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((sales_recent_quarter - sales_prior_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prior_quarter, 0)
            END
          ELSE
            CASE
              WHEN weekly_avg_sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND weekly_avg_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN weekly_avg_sales_prior_quarter = 0 AND weekly_avg_sales_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((weekly_avg_sales_recent_quarter - weekly_avg_sales_prior_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(weekly_avg_sales_prior_quarter, 0)
            END
        END
      ) AS INTEGER
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS "growth_qoq_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter_%",
  comparison_basis,
  included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
  included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter
FROM final_calc;

WITH max_week AS (

),
current_q AS (

  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week mw
    ON d.week_end_date = mw.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    mw.max_week_end_date,
    cq.current_quarter_label,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', mw.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start,

    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', mw.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', mw.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_end
  FROM max_week mw
  CROSS JOIN current_q cq
),
prior_q AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.quarter_year AS prior_quarter_label
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_bounds qb
    ON d.week_end_date = qb.prior_quarter_end
),
flags AS (
  SELECT
    qb.max_week_end_date,
    qb.current_quarter_label,
    pq.prior_quarter_label,
    qb.current_quarter_start,
    qb.current_quarter_end,
    qb.prior_quarter_start,
    qb.prior_quarter_end,
    CASE WHEN qb.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_complete,
    CASE WHEN qb.max_week_end_date >= qb.prior_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_complete,
    CASE WHEN (qb.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end) AND (qb.max_week_end_date >= qb.prior_quarter_end) THEN 'TOTAL' ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVG' END AS comparison_basis_used
  FROM quarter_bounds qb
  CROSS JOIN prior_q pq
),
weeks_distinct AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
weeks_with_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    wd.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, wd.week_end_date) AS week_start
  FROM weeks_distinct wd
),
included_weeks_current AS (
  SELECT
    wwb.week_end_date
  FROM weeks_with_bounds wwb
  JOIN flags f
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(wwb.week_start, f.current_quarter_start),
      LEAST(wwb.week_end_date, f.current_quarter_end)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
included_weeks_prior AS (
  SELECT
    wwb.week_end_date
  FROM weeks_with_bounds wwb
  JOIN flags f
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(wwb.week_start, f.prior_quarter_start),
      LEAST(wwb.week_end_date, f.prior_quarter_end)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    f.current_quarter_label,
    f.prior_quarter_label,
    f.comparison_basis_used,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.current_quarter_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS recent_total_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.prior_quarter_label THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS prior_total_sales
  FROM flags f

    ON d.quarter_year IN (f.current_quarter_label, f.prior_quarter_label)
  GROUP BY
    f.current_quarter_label,
    f.prior_quarter_label,
    f.comparison_basis_used

weekly_norm AS (

    f.prior_quarter_label,

    COUNT(DISTINCT iwc.week_end_date) AS recent_weeks_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN iwp.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS prior_weeks_total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT iwp.week_end_date) AS prior_weeks_count
  FROM flags f
  JOIN data_867 d
    ON 1 = 1
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_current iwc
    ON d.week_end_date = iwc.week_end_date
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_prior iwp
    ON d.week_end_date = iwp.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    f.current_quarter_label,
    f.prior_quarter_label,
    f.comparison_basis_used
),
included_week_lists AS (
  SELECT
    f.current_quarter_label,
    f.prior_quarter_label,
    f.comparison_basis_used,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(iwc.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY iwc.week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(iwp.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY iwp.week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  FROM flags f
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_current iwc
    ON 1 = 1
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_prior iwp
    ON 1 = 1
  GROUP BY
    f.current_quarter_label,
    f.prior_quarter_label,
    f.comparison_basis_used
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
      THEN CAST(t.recent_total_sales AS INTEGER)
    ELSE CAST(wn.recent_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.recent_weeks_count, 0) AS INTEGER)
  END AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
      THEN CAST(t.prior_total_sales AS INTEGER)
    ELSE CAST(wn.prior_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.prior_weeks_count, 0) AS INTEGER)
  END AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN
          (
            CASE
              WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
                THEN t.prior_total_sales
              ELSE (wn.prior_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.prior_weeks_count, 0))
            END
          ) = 0
          AND
          (
            CASE
              WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
                THEN t.recent_total_sales
              ELSE (wn.recent_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.recent_weeks_count, 0))
            END
          ) > 0
          THEN 100
        ELSE
          (
            (
              CASE
                WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
                  THEN t.recent_total_sales
                ELSE (wn.recent_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.recent_weeks_count, 0))
              END
              -
              CASE
                WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
                  THEN t.prior_total_sales
                ELSE (wn.prior_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.prior_weeks_count, 0))
              END
            )
            /
            NULLIF(
              CASE
                WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'TOTAL'
                  THEN t.prior_total_sales
                ELSE (wn.prior_weeks_total_sales / NULLIF(wn.prior_weeks_count, 0))
              END,
              0
            )
          ) * 100
      END
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "growth_qoq_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter%",
  f.current_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
  f.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
  f.comparison_basis_used,
  CASE WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'WEEKLY_AVG' THEN iwl.recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates ELSE NULL END AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
  CASE WHEN f.comparison_basis_used = 'WEEKLY_AVG' THEN iwl.prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates ELSE NULL END AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
FROM flags f
JOIN totals t
  ON t.current_quarter_label = f.current_quarter_label
 AND t.prior_quarter_label = f.prior_quarter_label
 AND t.comparison_basis_used = f.comparison_basis_used
JOIN weekly_norm wn
  ON wn.current_quarter_label = f.current_quarter_label
 AND wn.prior_quarter_label = f.prior_quarter_label
 AND wn.comparison_basis_used = f.comparison_basis_used
JOIN included_week_lists iwl
  ON iwl.current_quarter_label = f.current_quarter_label
 AND iwl.prior_quarter_label = f.prior_quarter_label
 AND iwl.comparison_basis_used = f.comparison_basis_used;

WITH max_wed AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_q_bounds AS (

    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', max_week_end_date))) AS recent_q_end
  FROM max_wed
),
prior_q_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_q_start,

    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, recent_q_start) AS prior_q_start,

  FROM recent_q_bounds
),
q_flags AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_q_start,
    recent_q_end,
    prior_q_start,
    prior_q_end,
    CASE WHEN max_week_end_date >= recent_q_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_complete,
    CASE WHEN max_week_end_date >= prior_q_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_complete
  FROM prior_q_bounds
),
q_labels AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    (
      SELECT quarter_year
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE d.week_end_date = f.max_week_end_date
      QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY quarter_year) = 1
    ) AS quarter_year_recent
  FROM q_flags f
),
q_labels_2 AS (
  SELECT
    ql.*,
    CASE
      WHEN TRY_TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2)) IS NULL OR TRY_TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2)) IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 1) = 'Q1' THEN CONCAT('Q4-', LPAD(TO_VARCHAR(TRY_TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2)) - 1), 2, '0'))
      WHEN SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 1) = 'Q2' THEN CONCAT('Q1-', SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2))
      WHEN SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 1) = 'Q3' THEN CONCAT('Q2-', SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2))
      WHEN SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 1) = 'Q4' THEN CONCAT('Q3-', SPLIT_PART(quarter_year_recent, '-', 2))
      ELSE NULL
    END AS quarter_year_prior
  FROM q_labels ql
),
weeks_scaffold AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start
  FROM data_867 d
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weeks_with_overlap AS (
  SELECT
    q.*,
    w.week_end_date,
    w.week_start,
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(w.week_start, q.recent_q_start),
      LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.recent_q_end)
    ) + 1 AS overlap_days_recent,
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(w.week_start, q.prior_q_start),
      LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_q_end)
    ) + 1 AS overlap_days_prior
  FROM q_labels_2 q
  CROSS JOIN weeks_scaffold w
),
included_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year_recent,
    quarter_year_prior,
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_q_start,
    recent_q_end,
    prior_q_start,
    prior_q_end,
    recent_complete,
    prior_complete,
    week_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN overlap_days_recent >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS in_recent_q,
    CASE
      WHEN overlap_days_prior >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS in_prior_q
  FROM weeks_with_overlap
),
week_lists AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year_recent,
    quarter_year_prior,
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_q_start,
    recent_q_end,
    prior_q_start,
    prior_q_end,
    recent_complete,
    prior_complete,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN in_recent_q = 1 THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN in_prior_q = 1 THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN in_recent_q = 1 THEN week_end_date END) AS num_weeks_recent,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN in_prior_q = 1 THEN week_end_date END) AS num_weeks_prior
  FROM included_weeks
  GROUP BY
    quarter_year_recent,
    quarter_year_prior,
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_q_start,
    recent_q_end,
    prior_q_start,
    prior_q_end,
    recent_complete,
    prior_complete
),
totals_by_quarter_year AS (
  SELECT
    ql.quarter_year_recent,
    ql.quarter_year_prior,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = ql.quarter_year_recent THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_recent_complete_basis,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = ql.quarter_year_prior THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_prior_complete_basis
  FROM q_labels_2 ql
  JOIN data_867 d
    ON d.quarter_year IN (ql.quarter_year_recent, ql.quarter_year_prior)
  GROUP BY
    ql.quarter_year_recent,
    ql.quarter_year_prior
),
totals_by_included_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    wl.quarter_year_recent,
    wl.quarter_year_prior,
    SUM(CASE WHEN iw.in_recent_q = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_recent_incomplete_basis,
    SUM(CASE WHEN iw.in_prior_q = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_prior_incomplete_basis
  FROM week_lists wl
  JOIN included_weeks iw
    ON iw.quarter_year_recent = wl.quarter_year_recent
   AND iw.quarter_year_prior = wl.quarter_year_prior
  JOIN data_867 d
    ON d.week_end_date = iw.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    wl.quarter_year_recent,
    wl.quarter_year_prior
),
final_calc AS (
  SELECT
    wl.quarter_year_recent,
    wl.quarter_year_prior,
    wl.recent_complete,
    wl.prior_complete,
    wl.included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    wl.included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    wl.num_weeks_recent,
    wl.num_weeks_prior,
    tcy.total_recent_complete_basis,
    tcy.total_prior_complete_basis,
    tiw.total_recent_incomplete_basis,
    tiw.total_prior_incomplete_basis,
    CASE
      WHEN wl.recent_complete = 1 AND wl.prior_complete = 1 THEN 'total_sales'
      ELSE 'weekly_average'
    END AS comparison_basis
  FROM week_lists wl
  JOIN totals_by_quarter_year tcy
    ON tcy.quarter_year_recent = wl.quarter_year_recent
   AND tcy.quarter_year_prior = wl.quarter_year_prior
  JOIN totals_by_included_weeks tiw
    ON tiw.quarter_year_recent = wl.quarter_year_recent
   AND tiw.quarter_year_prior = wl.quarter_year_prior
)
SELECT
  quarter_year_recent,
  quarter_year_prior,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_recent_complete_basis
      ELSE total_recent_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_recent, 0)
    END AS INTEGER
  ) AS sales_recent_quarter,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_prior_complete_basis
      ELSE total_prior_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_prior, 0)
    END AS INTEGER
  ) AS sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_prior_complete_basis
              ELSE total_prior_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_prior, 0)
            END AS INTEGER
          ) = 0
          AND CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_recent_complete_basis
              ELSE total_recent_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_recent, 0)
            END AS INTEGER
          ) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_prior_complete_basis
              ELSE total_prior_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_prior, 0)
            END AS INTEGER
          ) = 0
          AND CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_recent_complete_basis
              ELSE total_recent_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_recent, 0)
            END AS INTEGER
          ) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE
            (
              (
                CAST(
                  CASE
                    WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_recent_complete_basis
                    ELSE total_recent_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_recent, 0)
                  END AS INTEGER
                )
                -
                CAST(
                  CASE
                    WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_prior_complete_basis
                    ELSE total_prior_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_prior, 0)
                  END AS INTEGER
                )
              )
              / NULLIF(
                CAST(
                  CASE
                    WHEN recent_complete = 1 AND prior_complete = 1 THEN total_prior_complete_basis
                    ELSE total_prior_incomplete_basis / NULLIF(num_weeks_prior, 0)
                  END AS INTEGER
                ),
                0
              )
            ) * 100
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      0
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS "growth_qoq_recent_vs_prior%",
  comparison_basis,
  included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
  included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter
FROM final_calc;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
r52w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 52
  ) d
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
area_r52w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
),
area_r4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
area_p4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
),
national_p4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_r52w_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_r4w_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_p4w_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    COALESCE(r52.sales_52w, 0) AS sales_52w,
    COALESCE(r4.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p4.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS sales_prev_4w,
    n52.national_sales_52w
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN area_r52w_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN area_r4w_sales_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN area_p4w_sales_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    CAST(sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN national_sales_52w > 0 THEN (sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0)
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_52w_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN CONCAT('100', '%')
      WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN CONCAT('0', '%')
      ELSE CONCAT(
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            ((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0),
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS growth_4w_pct,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_52w > 0 THEN (sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0)
          ELSE 0
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'National' AS campus_region,
    CAST(n52.national_sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(n4.national_sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(p4.national_sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN CONCAT('100', '%') ELSE CONCAT('0', '%') END AS contribution_52w_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN CONCAT('100', '%')
      WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN CONCAT('0', '%')
      ELSE CONCAT(
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            ((n4.national_sales_4w - p4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0),
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS growth_4w_pct,
    CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte p4
),
final_with_national_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_52w_pct,
    growth_4w_pct,
    contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_52w_pct,
    growth_4w_pct,
    contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM national_metrics_cte
)
SELECT
  campus_region AS area,
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  contribution_52w_pct,
  growth_4w_pct
FROM final_with_national_cte
ORDER BY contribution_52w_pct_value DESC;

WITH
max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_week_end_date,
    max_week_end_date
  FROM max_date_cte
),
filtered_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM data_867 s
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE s.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start_week_end_date AND w.max_week_end_date
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM filtered_sales_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM filtered_sales_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ss.parent_id,
    ss.parent_account_name,
    ss.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(ss.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(100 * ss.sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_sales_52w, 0), 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_52w_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(100 * ss.sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
    END AS contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  campus_tier,
  sales_52w,
  contribution_52w_pct
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY contribution_52w_pct_value DESC, sales_52w DESC;

question: What were the sales in the recent quarter?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    CASE WHEN b.max_week_end_date >= b.recent_quarter_end_date THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS recent_quarter_is_complete,
    CASE WHEN b.max_week_end_date >= b.prior_quarter_end_date THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS prior_quarter_is_complete
  FROM recent_quarter_boundaries_cte b
),
recent_quarter_label_cte AS (
  SELECT d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_year
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.quarter_year
),
recent_quarter_totals_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS recent_quarter_total_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label_cte q
  WHERE c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
    AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
    AND d.quarter_year = q.recent_quarter_year
),
prior_quarter_totals_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS prior_quarter_total_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
  WHERE c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
    AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
    AND d.date >= c.prior_quarter_start_date
    AND d.date <= c.prior_quarter_end_date
),
week_flags_recent_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
    c.recent_quarter_start_date AS period_start_date,
    c.recent_quarter_end_date AS period_end_date,
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), c.recent_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(d.week_end_date, c.recent_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 AS overlap_days
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) d
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
),
weekly_inclusion_recent_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS recent_quarter_included_week_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_included_week_count,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN week_flags_recent_quarter_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
  WHERE (c.recent_quarter_is_complete = FALSE OR c.prior_quarter_is_complete = FALSE)
    AND w.overlap_days >= 3
),
week_flags_prior_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
    c.prior_quarter_start_date AS period_start_date,
    c.prior_quarter_end_date AS period_end_date,
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), c.prior_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(d.week_end_date, c.prior_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 AS overlap_days
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) d
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
),
weekly_inclusion_prior_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS prior_quarter_included_week_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_included_week_count,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN week_flags_prior_quarter_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
  WHERE (c.recent_quarter_is_complete = FALSE OR c.prior_quarter_is_complete = FALSE)
    AND w.overlap_days >= 3
),
normalized_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(r.recent_quarter_included_week_sales / NULLIF(r.recent_quarter_included_week_count, 0) AS INTEGER) AS recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales,
    CAST(p.prior_quarter_included_week_sales / NULLIF(p.prior_quarter_included_week_count, 0) AS INTEGER) AS prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales,
    r.recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    p.prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  FROM weekly_inclusion_recent_quarter_cte r
  CROSS JOIN weekly_inclusion_prior_quarter_cte p
),
qoq_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.recent_quarter_is_complete,
    c.prior_quarter_is_complete,
    CASE
      WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
        THEN CAST(rt.recent_quarter_total_sales AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(n.recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales AS INTEGER)
    END AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    CASE
      WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
        THEN CAST(pt.prior_quarter_total_sales AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales AS INTEGER)
    END AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
    n.recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    n.prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    CAST(n.recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales AS INTEGER) AS recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales,
    CAST(n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales AS INTEGER) AS prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN
            (CASE
              WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN pt.prior_quarter_total_sales
              ELSE n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales
            END) = 0
            AND
            (CASE
              WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN rt.recent_quarter_total_sales
              ELSE n.recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales
            END) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN
            (CASE
              WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN pt.prior_quarter_total_sales
              ELSE n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales
            END) = 0
            AND
            (CASE
              WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN rt.recent_quarter_total_sales
              ELSE n.recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales
            END) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            (
              (
                (CASE
                  WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN rt.recent_quarter_total_sales
                  ELSE n.recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales
                END)
                -
                (CASE
                  WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN pt.prior_quarter_total_sales
                  ELSE n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales
                END)
              )
              /
              NULLIF(
                (CASE
                  WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE AND c.prior_quarter_is_complete = TRUE THEN pt.prior_quarter_total_sales
                  ELSE n.prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales
                END),
                0
              )
            ) * 100
        END
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter%"
  FROM quarter_completeness_cte c
  LEFT JOIN recent_quarter_totals_cte rt
    ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN prior_quarter_totals_cte pt
    ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN normalized_quarter_metrics_cte n
    ON TRUE
)
SELECT
  quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  "growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter%",
  recent_quarter_is_complete,
  prior_quarter_is_complete,
  recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
  prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
  recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales,
  prior_quarter_weekly_average_sales
FROM qoq_growth_cte;

    FROM data_867
  ),
  last_52_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT t.*
    FROM data_867 t
    CROSS JOIN max_date_cte m
    WHERE t.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
  ),
  mapped_parent_types_cte AS (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'Academic'
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'Community'
        ELSE NULL
      END AS mapped_parent_account_type,
      relmora_total_mg
    FROM last_52_weeks_cte
  ),
  national_total_cte AS (
    SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w_mg
    FROM last_52_weeks_cte
  ),
  group_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
      mapped_parent_account_type,
      SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w_mg_by_parent_type
    FROM mapped_parent_types_cte
    WHERE mapped_parent_account_type IN ('Academic', 'Community')
    GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_type
  ),
  contribution_calc_cte AS (
    SELECT
      g.mapped_parent_account_type,
      CAST(g.sales_52w_mg_by_parent_type AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w_mg_by_parent_type,
      CASE
        WHEN n.national_sales_52w_mg = 0 THEN '0%'
        ELSE CONCAT(
          CAST(ROUND((g.sales_52w_mg_by_parent_type * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
          '%'
        )
      END AS sales_contribution_52w
    FROM group_sales_cte g
    CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
  )
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_type,
  sales_52w_mg_by_parent_type,
  sales_contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY sales_contribution_52w DESC, mapped_parent_account_type ASC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_week_end_date,
    max_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
base_windowed_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start_week_end_date AND w.max_week_end_date
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w_national_total
  FROM base_windowed_cte
),
parent_segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w_parent
  FROM base_windowed_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.parent_id,
    p.parent_account_name,
    CAST(ROUND(p.sales_52w_parent, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w_parent,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(n.sales_52w_national_total, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(100 * p.sales_52w_parent / NULLIF(n.sales_52w_national_total, 0), 0), '%')
    END AS contribution_52w_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(n.sales_52w_national_total, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(100 * p.sales_52w_parent / NULLIF(n.sales_52w_national_total, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS contribution_52w_pct_value
  FROM parent_segment_sales_cte p
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  sales_52w_parent,
  contribution_52w_pct
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_52w_pct_value DESC,
  sales_52w_parent DESC,
  parent_account_name ASC;
